name: Citrus Berry Soup (Weight Watchers Magazine)
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Light sour cream (25 calories per tablespoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a food processor.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Chill soup at least 30 minutes before serving.
Each half-cup serving provides:
1/2 Macronutrient, 1 Fiber, 15 Calories per serving
94 calories, 4 grams protein, 2 grams fat, 16 grams carbohydrates, 43 milligrams sodium, 6 milligrams cholesterol.
